info.title: CourseHub API
info.description: Complete API documentation for CourseHub platform

post.description: Authenticate the user using email and password and issue an access token.

delete.description: Revoke all access tokens for an authenticated user.
Revoke the current access token for an authenticated user.

post.description: Register a new user and issue an access token.
Resend the email verification notification to the authenticated user.
Send an email with a link to reset the password.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of courses.

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search courses by title or description.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort courses by field. Use "-" prefix for descending order.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific course.

get.summary: Retrieve a list of course lessons
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of course lessons.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort lessons by field. Use "-" prefix for descending order.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific lesson.

LoginUserRequest.title: Login User Request
LoginUserRequest.description: Request payload for authenticating a user.

remember.description: Remember me flag of the user.

RegisterUserRequest.title: Register User Request
RegisterUserRequest.description: Request payload for registering a new user.

password_confirmation.description: Password confirmation of the user. (must match password)
Password confirmation of the user. (must match password)

token.description: Password reset token received via email.

SendPasswordResetEmailRequest.title: Send Password Reset Email Request
SendPasswordResetEmailRequest.description: Request payload for sending password reset link.

AuthResponse.title: Auth Response
AuthResponse.description: Data returned after user login or registration.

access_token.description: Personal access token for API authentication.

token_type.description: Token type to be used in the Authorization header.

email_verified_at.description: Time of the email verified at.

CreateCourseRequest.title: Create Course Request
CreateCourseRequest.description: Request payload for creating a new course.

slug.description: Slug of the course. (optional, must be unique if provided)

UpdateCourseImageRequest.title: Update Course Image Request
UpdateCourseImageRequest.description: Request payload for updating a course image.

_method.description: Method spoofing to treat POST as PUT.

UpdateCourseRequest.title: Update Course Request
UpdateCourseRequest.description: Request payload for updating the course.

slug.description: Slug of the course. (must be unique)

Author.title: Author Schema
Author.description: Details of a author returned by the API

author_id.description: Author unique identifier of the course

CreateLessonRequest.title: Create Lesson Request
CreateLessonRequest.description: Request payload for creating a new lesson.

slug.description: Slug of the lesson. (optional, must be unique if provided)

CreateOfflineLessonRequest.title: Create Offline Lesson Request
CreateOfflineLessonRequest.description: Offline part of request payload for creating a new lesson.

start_time.description: Start time of the offline lesson.

end_time.description: End time of the offline lesson.

room_number.description: Room number of the offline lesson.

CreateOnlineLessonRequest.title: Create Online Lesson Request
CreateOnlineLessonRequest.description: Online part of request payload for creating a new lesson.

start_time.description: Start time of the online lesson.

end_time.description: End time of the online lesson.

CreateVideoLessonRequest.title: Create Video Lesson Request
CreateVideoLessonRequest.description: Video part of request payload for creating a new lesson.

slug.description: Slug of the lesson. (must be unique)

UpdateOfflineLessonRequest.title: Update Offline Lesson Request
UpdateOfflineLessonRequest.description: Offline part of request payload for updating the lesson.

start_time.description: Start time of the offline lesson.

end_time.description: End time of the offline lesson.

room_number.description: Room number of the offline lesson.

UpdateOnlineLessonRequest.title: Update Online Lesson Request
UpdateOnlineLessonRequest.description: Online part of request payload for updating the lesson.

start_time.description: Start time of the online lesson.

end_time.description: End time of the online lesson.

UpdateVideoLessonRequest.title: Update Video Lesson Request
UpdateVideoLessonRequest.description: Video part of request payload for updating the lesson.

course_id.description: Course unique identifier of the lesson.

OfflineLessonResponse.title: Offline Lesson Response
OfflineLessonResponse.description: Content of a specific offline lesson.

start_time.description: Start time of the offline lesson.

end_time.description: End time of the offline lesson.

room_number.description: Room number of the offline lesson.

OnlineLessonResponse.title: Online Lesson Response
